changelog: Phase 7.2: 54-ФЗ fiscal receipt scaffolding. New lib/Fiscal/AtolOnline.php adapter implements АТОЛ Онлайн v4 happy-path (getToken / sell / report). lib/OrderPaidHook.php gets cleanmenu_emit_fiscal_receipt — fires on order.paid, persists receipt uuid, never blocks payment confirmation on fiscalisation failure. scripts/fiscal-receipt-worker.php (cron */2) polls pending uuids, stamps fiscal_receipt_url when ready, clears uuid on fail to allow retry. Migration sql/fiscal-receipt-migration.sql adds nullable fiscal_receipt_uuid + fiscal_receipt_url + idx_orders_fiscal_pending. Tenant config keys documented in docs/fiscal-54fz.md.
